answers: Start surfing: take a lesson, use a big foam board (more stable), practice pop-ups on beach first.
Beginner tips: start with small waves, paddle hard before standing, look where you want to go (not down at feet).
Best spots: Bali, Hawaii, Portugal, Australia, Costa Rica, Sri Lanka. Look for beach breaks with gentle waves.
Surfing basics: learn ocean safety, understand rip currents, respect other surfers, and don't give up after falling!
